name: Nikana
description: The Nikana reintroduces a lost Tenno blade and with it another fragment of the old ways.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Nikana reintroduces a lost Tenno blade and with it another fragment of the old ways.

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.changes: Nikana Weapon

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect elemental FX appearing on the Dogma Two-Handed Nikana Skin.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some melee weapons (ex: Nikana with Blind Justice) not chain attacking while blocking in melee-only mode.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.changes: Ksara Two-Handed Nikana Skin by kakarrot2812
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemy teleporting while performing a stealth kill with a Two-Handed Nikana (Tatsu, Pennant, etc.).

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.changes: Includes Revenant Mephisto Skin, Revenant Mephisto Helmet, and Orison Two-Handed Nikana Skin.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed multiple issues with the Nikana Zaw (Sepfahn Strike):

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Update 30.1.0

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Teplo Syandana and Nikana Prime materials appearing translucent with Deferred Rendering enabled.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Elemental FX not working properly on Excalibur Deluxe Nikana.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing Melee sounds on Zaws equipped with a Scythe or Nikana Skin.

patchlogs.name: TennoGen & Nightwave Episode 5: Hotfix 25.7.7
patchlogs.changes: We also have an official end date for Nightwave: Series 2! You have until October 13th to rank up and earn rewards, including the Emissary Operator Suit, Nikana Maligna Skin, Spore Ephemera and more!

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed sheathed weapons not taking elemental colors when default Energy color are used (Nikana, Silva/Aegis, etc).
Fixed missing swing trail FX on the Nikana Tekelu Skin.

patchlogs.name: Augment Tweaks: Hotfix 25.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed low-resolution textures on the Two-Handed Nikana Maligna Skin.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.4.1 + 25.4.1.1
patchlogs.changes: Nikana Tekelu Skin
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tekelu Nikana Skin not being available for all Nikana variants.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Amalgam Daikyu Target Acquired not applying lifesteal to Zaw Nikanas.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Energy colors on Nikana sheathes not being applied in mission.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nikana Gemini Sheath Energy color persisting as default.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.5.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Nikana Shinigami Skin by Hitsu San and Reil
Nikana Mithra Skin lukinu_u

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Nikana slam range increased to 6m
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing Nikana swipes not playing during a Parry Finisher.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nikana Zaw unsheath and spin sounds not playing on idle animation.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.4.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Dax Nikana Skin not properly applying the chosen Energy color.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed wonky clipping with Sugratras and the Umbra Nikana.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.18.5
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue with Sepfahn Zaw part creating it's Nikana holster when used for a 2 handed grip.
Fixed an issue with the Sepfahn Zaw part making extra cloth dangles when made into a Nikana. 
Fixed issues with Nikana Zaws & Heavy Axe Zaws not having holster customizations.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.18.0
patchlogs.changes: A balanced Zaw Strike for Nikana and Staff weapons. A steady blade for steady hands.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Mirage Prime 22.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Saryn Prime, Nikana Prime and Spira Prime have entered the Prime Vault, and their Relics are no longer be obtainable in the game.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.6.0
patchlogs.changes: Nikana Prime Blueprint

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.additions: Added custom leap attack animations for the Nikana.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the sheath orientation on the Nikana when attacking.
Fixed the Nikana sheath becoming unattached from your hand and flipped around when performing an air attack.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nikana weapons not being able to stealth-finish Infested Chargers.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes: Ash’s passive in Conclave changed to Bleed debuff from hits with weapons from the Nikana family.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.9.1
patchlogs.changes: Added a second Nikana Melee attack after the slam in Quick Steel Conclave Variant.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.2.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed incorrect textures being used when equipping the Ryu Nikana Skin on the Dragon Nikana.
Fixed a floating attachment when equipping the Ryu Nikana Skin on the Dragon Nikana.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Hotfix 3 (Nekros Prime!)
patchlogs.changes:
the Nyx Prime Neuroptics will be replaced with Vauban Prime Neuroptics and Scindo Prime Blade will be replaced with Nikana Prime Blade.
Reduced damage of Nikana series in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed hearing the Nikana Prime swinging sound from across the map.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.12.0: Vauban Prime & 18.12.1
patchlogs.changes: •    The Ymir-Form Gemini Nikana Sheath and the Surt-Form Gemini Nikana Sheath can now be equipped on the Nikana, Nikana Prime and Dragon Nikana.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Dragon Nikana
Nikana
Reduced the damage of Guiding Light Nikana attack in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nikana Prime and Spira Prime not appearing in the Codex.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.12: Saryn Prime
patchlogs.fixes:
including Saryn Prime, Nikana Prime, Spira Prime, and exclusive cosmetics only available through Prime Access!
An ancient blade predating the fall of the Orokin Empire. Forged using techniques lost over the centuries, the edge remains sharper than that of any modern Nikana.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.changes: Nikana series damage has been decreased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes: • The Nikana and Dragon Nikana have been enabled for use in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.3.3 + 16.3.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Updated the Gemini Nikana Sheathe bundle to require Mastery Rank 4 to help prevent players from purchasing the item without owning a Nikana.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed attachments to the Dragon Nikana’s sheathe not displaying properly.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Sanctuary
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Dragon Nikana’s Hilt appearing as orange even with no color selected.
Fixed grammatical error in the Gemini Nikana’s Market description.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.16 + Tactical Alert!
patchlogs.changes:
Gemini Nikana Sheath available now!
The energy flowing within this sheath changes to match the blade within it. The Nikana will cause the energy to flow like the current of a river, while the Dragon Nikana causes the sheath to rage with molten fury.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Nikana weapons using the wrong animation for jump slams.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.10.3
patchlogs.changes: Altered the Nikana jump roll transition time and animation to match the default roll.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.10.0
patchlogs.additions: Blind Justice: a new Nikana Stance has arrived!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an animation hitch seen when performing a forward roll with the Nikana equipped.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Improved the tintability on the Dragon Nikana.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.0.6+13.0.7+13.0.7.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue with elemental effects not properly being displayed when the Nikana is sheathed.
Fixed the accessory offsets on the Dragon Nikana and made them match that of the Nikana.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed description for Dragon Nikana and touched up icon.
